title: Infosys Receives Ethisphere Compliance Leader Verification
detailed_summary: Infosys announced that Ethisphere awarded it the Compliance Leader Verification™, recognizing the strength, maturity, and effectiveness of its ethics and compliance program. The recognition follows an independent assessment covering ethics and compliance program structure, culture, standards, training, risk assessment, monitoring, auditing, enforcement, discipline, and incentives.

key_facts.fact: Infosys was awarded the Compliance Leader Verification™ by Ethisphere.
key_facts.section_heading: Ethisphere Recognizes Infosys with Compliance Leader Verification™

key_facts.fact: The recognition reflects Ethisphere's assessment of the strength, maturity, and effectiveness of Infosys' ethics and compliance program.
key_facts.section_heading: Ethisphere Recognizes Infosys with Compliance Leader Verification™

key_facts.fact: Infosys had been named among Ethisphere's World's Most Ethical Companies® in 2025 for the fifth consecutive year.
key_facts.section_heading: Ethisphere Recognizes Infosys with Compliance Leader Verification™

esg_or_csr_items.item: Infosys received Ethisphere's Compliance Leader Verification™ for its ethics and compliance program.
